title: Reckless and negligent docket opened after N2 accident near Hornlee
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Police opened a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Police opened a reckless and negligent driving docket after a pedestrian was hit along the N2 near the turn-off to Hornlee last Friday. The incident happened at about 19:45.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Police opened a reckless and negligent driving docket after a pedestrian was hit along the N2 near the turn-off to Hornlee last Friday. The incident happened at about 19:45."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Chris Spies, police spokesperson for the Southern Cape, said in a statement that, according to reports, emergency services were summoned to the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"On arrival they found a police vehicle and a woman who sustained serious leg injuries. She was taken to hospital for medical care and the victim was later transferred to a hospital in George. The police's employee health and wellness (EHW) practitioners were assigned to the [police] member to provide professional care. He was on duty at the time of the incident,\" read his statement.","html":"\"On arrival they found a police vehicle and a woman who sustained serious leg injuries. She was taken to hospital for medical care and the victim was later transferred to a hospital in George. The police's employee health and wellness (EHW) practitioners were assigned to the [police] member to provide professional care. He was on duty at the time of the incident,\" read his statement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Reckless and negligent docket opened after N2 accident near Hornlee
